action.reasoning: Observation: CTC training completed within the remaining time and saved checkpoints/ctc.pt, but no evaluation has been submitted yet. The visible predict.py excerpt suggests it may still default to retrieval when a retrieval_db.pt exists in the checkpoint directory, which would prevent evaluating the new CTC checkpoint. Analysis: with only ~8.6 minutes left, I need to quickly inspect predict.py/ctc_train.py to confirm the checkpoint format and prediction dispatch before submitting. Decision: inspect the relevant code sections with minimal command time, then patch/submit in the next iteration.
action.command: grep -n "CTC\|ctc\|run_retrieval\|class CTC\|HMERModel" predict.py ctc_train.py model.py | head -120
